---
name: New field preset
about: Propose a ready-made source pack for a new field (SOURCE_PRESET)
title: "[preset] "
labels: enhancement, presets

**Field**
<!-- e.g. climate, robotics, legal-tech, devops -->

**Who is the reader?**
One sentence — the person who'd want this briefing daily and what they'd do
with it.

**Proposed sources**
- RSS feeds (verified reachable — paste URLs):
- Web-search targets (no reliable feed):
- arXiv categories / queries (if research applies):

**Willing to open a PR?**
A preset is one small file — see `src/presets/security.py` and
CONTRIBUTING.md. Happy to help you land it.
